title: TOCTOU race in consume()
description: consume() releases and re-acquires the lock between checking token count and deducting tokens. Two threads can both see sufficient tokens and both succeed, overdrawing the bucket.

title: time.time() instead of time.monotonic()
description: Uses time.time() for elapsed calculation. If the system clock is adjusted (NTP sync, DST, manual change), refill calculation breaks — could grant too many or too few tokens.

title: No __repr__ for debugging
description: TokenBucket has no __repr__ method. When debugging, print(bucket) shows unhelpful '<TokenBucket object at 0x...>' instead of current state.
